summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Savyn tontine platform. Covered: Functional (27 tests), Security/Penetration (14 tests), and Load tests (6 tests). All 47 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Platform is stable and ready for mobile app development.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only - not user-facing)

critical_code_review_comments: XSS sanitization is working correctly - script tags are HTML-escaped in admin user list
RBAC is properly implemented - non-admin users get 403 on all admin endpoints
JWT token validation is correct - expired/invalid tokens rejected
Suspended user login correctly blocked with appropriate error message
Load tests show platform handles concurrent requests well (10+ simultaneous operations)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* users created during load tests for concurrent registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests passing. Platform fully tested including: 1) Registration with terms acceptance, 2) Login flows (valid, invalid, suspended), 3) KYC submission and auto-approval, 4) Tontine CRUD with contract acceptance, 5) Marketplace filtering/sorting, 6) Wallet with CSV export, 7) Support ticketing, 8) Admin panel (users, tontines, tickets, fraud alerts, analytics), 9) Trust score calculation, 10) User settings. Security tests verified: XSS sanitization, NoSQL injection prevention, JWT validation, RBAC enforcement, IDOR protection, suspended user blocking. Load tests verified: 10 concurrent registrations, 10 concurrent logins, 20 concurrent marketplace requests, 5 concurrent admin requests.
passed_tests: ✅ Auth/me: returns user data with is_admin field
✅ KYC: status endpoint returns KYC status
✅ Lemon Way: status returns sandbox mode
✅ NoSQL: injection in login email rejected
✅ NoSQL: injection in login password rejected
✅ RBAC: non-admin blocked from suspend user (403)
✅ IDOR: user cannot access other user's wallet (403)
✅ Login form elements present with data-testid
✅ Admin nav link visible for admin user
✅ Admin nav link NOT visible for non-admin
✅ Marketplace shows 'Deja inscrit/Inscrit' for joined tontines
✅ Wallet page loads with export button
✅ Support page loads with FAQ and form
✅ Admin page loads with all tabs (users, tontines, tickets, fraud, analytics)
✅ Registration page terms checkbox validation working
✅ Submit button disabled without terms acceptance
✅ Admin page shows 'Accès refusé' for non-admin
mocked_api_note: KYC verification is auto-approved (MOCKED). SEPA payments are simulated via Stripe test mode (MOCKED). Lemon Way integration is in sandbox_simulated mode (MOCKED).
rca_of_issue: No issues found - all tests passing
